mapper.select: SELECT setting_key AS settingKey, setting_value AS settingValue, setting_desc AS settingDesc, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM blog_site_setting WHERE setting_key = #{settingKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_site_setting (setting_key, setting_value, setting_desc) VALUES (#{settingKey}, #{settingValue}, #{settingDesc}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE setting_value = VALUES(setting_value), setting_desc = VALUES(setting_desc), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
